sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Platform Architecture & Competitive Positioning
required_elements: Platform model classification and revenue channel breakdown
Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) and take-rate benchmarking
Market share and competitive positioning assessment
Fulfillment model and cost structure overview

sections.title: GMV Growth & Take-Rate Economics
required_elements: Comparable GMV/same-store sales growth decomposition (traffic and conversion)
Take-rate trends and channel mix shift analysis
1P vs. 3P gross margin economics comparison
Private label/exclusive product economics and strategic value

sections.title: Fulfillment Cost & Supply Chain Economics
required_elements: Fulfillment cost per unit trend and benchmark analysis
Inventory turnover and working capital dynamics
Return rate and reverse logistics cost impact
Operating leverage modeling as GMV scales

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/GMV multiple benchmarking vs. peers
EV/Revenue and adjusted EBITDA multiples by platform type
Subscription/loyalty revenue margin and LTV contribution
Advertising and services segment valuation

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Traffic, conversion, and GMV growth deceleration signals
Merchant/seller concentration and churn risk
Fulfillment cost inflation and margin squeeze dynamics
Competitive threats and regulatory commission cap impact

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Take-rate compression drivers and GMV growth path under scenarios
Fulfillment economics and operating leverage projections
Competitive market share and category expansion opportunity assessment
